zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness於大約1263年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness5歲，母親Graham20歲。她和Sir Simon Fraser Filius至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1316年在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness于大约1263年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness5岁，母亲Graham20岁。她和Sir Simon Fraser Filius至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1316年在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jarl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant or altered form of Härle (see Harle ).
English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness was born about 1263, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness, was 5 and her mother, Graham, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sir Simon Fraser Filius. She died in 1316, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness est née environ 1263, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Graham, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Simon Fraser Filius. Elle est décédée en 1316, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness um 1263 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness 5 und ihre Mutter Graham 20. Sie hatte mit Sir Simon Fraser Filius mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1316 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness è nata il circa 1263 nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness, aveva 5 anni e sua madre, Graham, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Sir Simon Fraser Filius. Morì nel 1316, nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithnessが約1263年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithnessは5歳，母Grahamは20歳であった。彼女はSir Simon Fraser Filiusとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1316年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Graham(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Simon Fraser Filius(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1316년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Graham, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Sir Simon Fraser Filius. Ela faleceu em 1316, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness родилась около 1263 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Graham, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sir Simon Fraser Filius. Она умерла в 1316 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness nació aproximadamente 1263, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Jón Magnússon, Jarl of Orkney and Caithness, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Graham, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Sir Simon Fraser Filius. Murió en 1316, en Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
